channel.title: Codehaks | Engineering-Driven CAD Solutions
channel.description: Recent content on Codehaks | Engineering-Driven CAD Solutions

item.title: CodeHaks TotalLength
item.description: Open-source AutoCAD plugin for calculating total length of selected objects

item.title: About
item.description: Mechanical engineer turned senior software developer — 20+ years building custom CAD plugins, automation, and engineering tools.

item.title: Services
item.description: Custom CAD plugin development, Autodesk cloud integration, engineering calculation tools, and technical leadership — engagement models and scope.

item.title: Calculate Total Length in AutoCAD with CodeHaks TotalLength
item.description: An open-source AutoCAD plugin that calculates the total length of selected lines, polylines, and arcs in a single command.
